mapper.sql: id, producttype, productinfoversion, stakeholderversion, releaseversion, creditenhanceversion, otherversion, createuser, createtimestamp, updatetimestamp, islock, removeflag
producttype, productinfoversion, stakeholderversion, releaseversion, creditenhanceversion, otherversion, createuser, createtimestamp, updatetimestamp, islock, removeflag
mapper.select:
select lll.id, lll.PRODUCTNAME, lll.PRODUCTSHORTNAME, lll.producttype, lll.manager, lll.issueid, lll.name as releasename, lll.createtimestamp, lll.updatetimestamp, lll.productinfoversion, rr.orgname as managername from ( select l.id, r.PRODUCTNAME, r.PRODUCTSHORTNAME, l.producttype, r.MANAGER , i.ISSUEID, s.name, l.createtimestamp, l.updatetimestamp, l.productinfoversion from pmjk_product l inner join pmjk_productinfo r on l.id = r.productid and l.PRODUCTINFOVERSION = r.versionnum inner join pmjk_releaseinfo i on i.productid = l.id and l.releaseversion = i.VERSIONNUM left join pmjk_base_institutions s on i.issueid = s.id where l.REMOVEFLAG = 0 ) lll inner join ( select ll.id, LISTAGG(o.orgname, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY o.orgname) as orgname from ( select distinct l.id , trim(regexp_substr(r.MANAGER, '[^,]+', 1, level)) AS token from pmjk_product l inner join pmjk_productinfo r on l.id = r.productid and l.PRODUCTINFOVERSION = r.versionnum where l.REMOVEFLAG = 0 CONNECT BY level <= regexp_count(r.MANAGER, ',') + 1 AND PRIOR dbms_random.value IS NOT NULL AND PRIOR r.MANAGER = r.MANAGER ) ll left join PMJK_BASE_ORGOBJECT o on ll.token = o.orgid group by ll.id ) rr on lll.id = rr.id
and lll.producttype=#{producttype} and lll.productname like '%' || #{productname} || '%'
order by lll.id desc
